Good Health and Well-being.reason: Multiple weekly topics like "Physical health," "Illnesses," "Mental health," and "Transportation (Accidents)" directly address health, well-being, and safety (Targets 3.4, 3.6).

Climate Action.reason: The weekly topic "natural disasters" directly relates to Target 13.1, which focuses on strengthening resilience and adaptive capacity to climate-related hazards and natural disasters.

Life on Land.reason: The course includes a specific topic on "Wildlife," which directly relates to targets on halting biodiversity loss and protecting threatened species (Target 15.5).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course includes a discussion topic on "Petty crime," which has a direct, though minor, link to targets on reducing violence and crime (Target 16.1).
